productDisplayName: Puma Men Logo Hooded Blue SweatShirt
description: CompositionIndigo blue sweatshirt with the outer shell made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has ribbing made of 95% cotton and 5% elastane, has a round neck with a hood, full sleeves that have ribbed cuffs, two pockets on the sides, and branding on the front in print and embroideryFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash in cold water using a mild detergentDo not soak or wringDry flat in shade and set shape when wetModerate warm ironWelcome the winter in style this season with this sweatshirt from puma. The thick fabric is sure to keep the winter chill at bay, while the hood makes you look hip. Wear it over jeans and slip into sneakers for snug comfort.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
